eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Faribault, MN; at 08:24 PM ON MAR 15, 2026 Effective until 06:24 AM MAR 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Due to current conditions all Faribault County roads are closed.  NO TRAVEL ADVISED
